features: Brings to life the playful fragrance of Pink Sweet Pea, evoking the hope and joy brought by a rejuvenating nature
Fragrance delicately diffused from natural rattan stems
Elegant design that looks fantastic in any room
Scented liquid in each bottle lasts up to four weeks
description: Air Wick Reed Diffuser uses natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful fragrances. Create a welcoming atmosphere in your home with its natural fragrance experience and elegant design. White Roses & Pink Sweet Pea Bask in the playful scent of the hay meadows & gardens inspired by the Yorkshire Dales in full bloom.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Indoor spaces such as living rooms, bedrooms, or offices
